underlying_goal: Fix emoji keybinds that don't work in certain apps (Discord, Claude Desktop) running under XWayland on Hyprland
friction_detail: Multiple attempted solutions (clipboard-based wl-copy, ydotool) all failed, requiring group changes and reboots, ultimately reverting to original broken state.
brief_summary: User wanted emoji keybinds to work in XWayland apps; Claude tried multiple approaches (wl-copy, ydotool) but none worked, and changes were reverted.
